title: Orbital Rod
description: It is an Orbital Strike canon in an enchantment
body:
Did you ever want to fire an Orbital Strike Cannon like WEMMBU, but didn’t want to actually build one yourself?

Now you can! With the new rare enchantment Orbital Strike, you can unleash 10 rings of TNT over a 100×100 area.

You can obtain the enchantment:

-In Creative mode as a book

-Via commands

-At the enchantment table.
